title: rosa arvensis subvar. rusticana
intro: Rosa arvensis subvar. rusticana, also known as the field rose or wild rose, is a variety of the Rosa arvensis plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa arvensis subvar. rusticana include reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for anxiety and insomnia. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in skincare products and cosmetics.
